svg.title: AIOps RCA mechanism breakdown
svg.desc: Step-by-step: a request to diagnose with an absolute time window queries the backend Prometheus API for five correlated signals, passes through a deterministic healthy-path gate, and only on a real fault builds a prompt and calls the LLM, which returns a structured root cause and emits its own gen_ai span back into the pipeline.
svg.text: FIGURE 2 — AIOps RCA, STEP BY STEP
How /diagnose turns five signals into a root cause
an absolute incident window (≈ scoping a capture)
deterministic logic decides IF a fault exists
NO model call · $0.00 · no false positive
model explains the fault it's given
probabilistic layer — only runs on a real fault
tokens · cost · latency → back to pipeline
(LLM observability — the AI is observed too)
